summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 8 features: Full CMS system for website content editing and photo storage improvements. All 16 backend API tests pass. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/cms/hero returns hero content with headline, subtitle, cta_text, cta_link, background_image
GET /api/cms/stats returns stats array with value and label fields
GET /api/cms/about returns about content with tagline, headline, description
GET /api/cms/faq returns FAQ array with question and answer fields
GET /api/cms/addons returns addons array with name, price, description fields
GET /api/cms/contact returns contact info with phone, email, address, hours
GET /api/admin/cms/hero returns hero content for admin (requires auth)
PUT /api/admin/cms/hero saves hero content and persists to database
PUT /api/admin/cms/stats saves stats array and persists to database
PUT /api/admin/cms/faq saves FAQ data and persists to database
PUT /api/admin/cms/addons saves addons data and persists to database
PUT /api/admin/cms/contact saves contact info and persists to database
Admin CMS endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Admin CMS returns 404 for invalid section names
Admin login works (isaacsarver100@gmail.com)
GET /api/admin/me returns admin info
Home page hero shows CMS headline 'Aerial Photography For Real Estate'
Home page stats show CMS values: 500+, 50+, 24hr, 100%
Home page about section shows CMS content
Pricing page loads FAQ from CMS API (5 FAQs displayed)
Pricing page loads add-ons from CMS API (4 add-ons displayed)
Admin CMS editor page loads with 6 tabs: Hero Section, Stats Bar, About Section, FAQ, Add-ons, Contact Info
Admin CMS editor saves and loads content correctly
Admin dashboard has 'Website Editor' nav item (10 total nav items)
Admin Settings page has Photo Storage section with editable storage path
Admin Settings page has Retention Period (days) setting
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 8 CMS features verified working: (1) Public CMS endpoints at /api/cms/* return website content (hero, stats, about, faq, addons, contact), (2) Admin CMS endpoints at /api/admin/cms/* allow editing all sections with authentication, (3) Home page fetches hero, stats, about from CMS APIs, (4) Pricing page fetches FAQ and addons from CMS APIs, (5) Admin dashboard has 'Website Editor' nav item with 6 tabs for editing all sections, (6) Admin Settings page has Photo Storage section with editable storage path and retention days, (7) Photo storage uses client name_email folder format (implemented in get_client_folder_name function), (8) Profile name change triggers folder rename (implemented in PUT /api/auth/profile). Email notifications remain MOCKED when SMTP not configured.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email notifications fall back to mock mode when SMTP is not configured. Credentials are logged to console.

cms_public_endpoints.details: GET /api/cms/hero, stats, about, faq, addons, contact all return correct content

cms_admin_endpoints.details: PUT /api/admin/cms/* endpoints save content to MongoDB 'cms' collection with different 'id' fields

home_page_cms_integration.details: Home page fetches hero, stats, about from CMS APIs and displays correctly

pricing_page_cms_integration.details: Pricing page fetches FAQ and addons from CMS APIs and displays correctly

admin_cms_editor.details: Admin dashboard has 'Website Editor' with 6 tabs: Hero Section, Stats Bar, About Section, FAQ, Add-ons, Contact Info

admin_settings_photo_storage.details: Admin Settings page has Photo Storage section with editable storage path (/app/backend/uploads) and retention days (30)

photo_folder_naming.details: Photo upload creates client folder with name_email format via get_client_folder_name() function

profile_name_folder_rename.details: PUT /api/auth/profile renames photo folder when client name changes
